summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Driver Security Deposit System (نظام تأمين موظفي التوصيل). All 18 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified for both Admin DriverSecurityTab and Driver SecurityDepositCard/ResignationSection components.

issues: Demo credentials shown on login page (0911111111) don't exist in database - only 0912345678 works for admin

action_items: Update demo credentials on login page to match actual test accounts (0912345678 for admin, 0988111333 for driver)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Driver Security System fully tested. APIs: GET /api/driver/security/status, GET /api/driver/security/settings, POST /api/driver/security/deposit, GET /api/driver/security/admin/drivers, POST /api/driver/security/admin/driver/{id}/suspend, POST /api/driver/security/admin/driver/{id}/activate, POST /api/driver/security/resign, GET /api/driver/security/my-resignation, POST /api/driver/security/resign/cancel. Frontend: Admin DriverSecurityTab shows all drivers with security deposit status, deposit requests, resignation requests, and settings. Driver dashboard shows SecurityDepositCard with deposit status and ResignationSection with resignation form.

frontend_components: Admin DriverSecurityTab - تبويب التأمينات في لوحة الأدمن ✅
Admin sub-tabs: جميع السائقين, طلبات الإيداع, طلبات الاستقالة, الإعدادات ✅
